chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2825 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing of case 1. For hearing of CMA No.13565/2023 2. For hearing of main case. 15-05-2025 Mr. Muzamil Hussain, advocate for the petitioner Amir Nausherwan Adil, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Deputy Attorney General along with Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General On the last date following order was passed:- Per learned counsel for the respondent, the petitioner is seeking to influence criminal proceedings by seeking recourse to writ jurisdiction and the same cannot be sanctioned by this Court. Mr. Aqib Ali, advocate holding brief for Mr. Iftikhar Hussain, advocate for the petitioner and requesting for adjournment. At his request, adjourned to 15.05.2025. Today learned counsel states under instructions that the petitioner shall seek remedy before the court of appropriate jurisdiction; hence, this petition may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
